title: The ultimate combination for AI-assisted programming: Superpowers Bridge and Speckit in practice
description: In the era of AI-assisted programming, code quality is often difficult to control. Superpowers Bridge seamlessly integrates a powerful set of AI skills into the rigorous workflow of the Spec Kit, strongly implementing Test-Driven Development (TDD) and in-depth troubleshooting protection mechanisms. This framework effectively prevents poor code structure caused by a lack of constraints, helping development teams establish standardized, visible, and high-quality AI coding safeguards.
content:
> **TL;DR**: 在 AI 辅助编程时代，代码质量可能由于生成过快而失控。将核心能力强大的 Superpowers AI 技能集无缝嵌入 Spec Kit 的 SDD 工作流，能够带来一套基于生命周期钩子的强制护栏。它将代码审查、TDD 测试驱动开发和系统性排障变为不可逾越的规则，彻底告别“面条代码”（Spaghetti code）。
In the wave of AI-assisted programming, we often encounter this pain point: AI generates code extremely quickly, but without clear constraints and standards, projects often end up as a bunch of unmaintainable "spaghetti code." To solve this problem, many teams have begun to adopt...**SDD (Spec-Driven Development)**Today, we're going to introduce a truly revolutionary open-source extension tool—**Superpowers Bridge**This article will guide you through understanding why you need this bridging tool and how it safeguards your code quality throughout the entire development lifecycle.

## 面临的挑战：失控的 AI 编码
Current AI coding is polarized: either unreliable, shotgun-style modifications using IDE inline dialogs, or black-box generation with heavy orchestration agents that are difficult to intervene in. Our early practical exploration of [Agentic Coding]...(/posts/agentic-coding-xcode-gemini-01-overview/)The study found that while traditional AI-assisted programming is efficient, it lacks [hard constraints in the process].(/posts/mastering-antigravity-agents/)In such situations, it's easy to fall into the following traps:

- **需求模糊**：在没有想清楚具体细节前就开始盲目生成代码。
- **测试缺失**：AI 信誓旦旦地宣称任务完成，但在流水线上却因为缺少测试或边界用例而崩溃。
- **排障碰运气**：遇到顽固错误往往只是让 AI “再试一次”，而不是系统性地深挖根因。
## 解决思路：流程与能力的结晶
To truly tame AI, we need to combine "standards" with "capabilities." This is the background to the creation of Superpowers Bridge, which is primarily composed of two cornerstone ecosystems:

- **Spec Kit**：定义了极其严格的开发流程工作流，将生命周期科学地切分为 
`specify` (Clarify requirements) -> `tasks` (Disassembly task) -> `implement` (Write code)It forces us to think clearly about what we want to do before writing the first line of code.- **Superpowers**：这是一套由专家凝练的 Agent 技能合集（[obra/superpowers](https://github.com/obra/superpowers)），它赋予 AI 诸如“测试驱动开发”、“结构化 Debug”以及“专业级 Code Review”等超越普通对话模型的能力单元。
By seamlessly integrating the battle-tested Superpowers into the rigorous workflow of the Spec Kit, the Superpowers Bridge essentially gave it a genetic boost. Superpowers that previously required active activation have all become indispensable components of the workflow.**Mandatory guardrails**。

```mermaid
flowchart TD
    classDef workflow fill:#f9f9f9,stroke:#333,stroke-width:2px
    classDef hook fill:#ffe4e1,stroke:#cd5c5c,stroke-width:2px
    classDef skill fill:#d4f1f4,stroke:#189ab4,stroke-width:2px

    subgraph spec_workflow [Spec Kit: Standard SDD Workflow]
        S(["specify (澄清需求)"]):::workflow
        T(["tasks (拆解任务)"]):::workflow
        I(["implement (编写代码)"]):::workflow
    end

    subgraph superpowers_bridge [Superpowers Bridge: Guardrails]
        B_S(["before_specify"]):::hook
        A_T(["after_tasks"]):::hook
        B_I(["before_implement"]):::hook
        A_I(["after_implement"]):::hook

        C["clarify (首脑风暴与澄清)"]:::skill
        R["review (任务覆盖检查)"]:::skill
        TDD["tdd (测试驱动开发)"]:::skill
        V["verify (测试结果核查)"]:::skill
        
        B_S -.->|挂载技能 可选| C
        A_T -.->|挂载技能 可选| R
        B_I -.->|挂载技能 强制| TDD
        A_I -.->|挂载技能 强制| V
    end

    B_S --> S
    S --> T
    T --> A_T
    A_T --> B_I
    B_I --> I
    I --> A_I
```
*Image: Superpowers Bridge connects AI coding capabilities with rigorously regulated workflows.*
## 核心实现：化“能力”为“护栏”
The most telling aspect of this bridging extension is its four lifecycle interceptors, deeply integrated based on the Spec Kit Hook mechanism. It not only helps generate code but also rigorously controls the final quality of the deployed code:

### 1. 写需求前拦截 (
`before_specify` ➡️ `clarify`)The most feared thing in development is "pseudo-requirements." This is addressed through mounting.`clarify`The tool/system will guide you as you begin writing the requirements specification.(Spec)I proactively engaged in in-depth brainstorming sessions with you beforehand to clarify my intentions and eliminate any vague ideas.

### 2. 拆解任务后拦截 (
`after_tasks` ➡️ `review`)The process will execute automatically.`review`Check and compare your generated task list.(`tasks.md`)Does it cover 100% of the original?`spec.md`This involves all business requirements. This stage forces the identification of overlooked boundary scenarios, preventing awkward situations later in development.

### 3. 写代码前拦截【强制】 (
`before_implement` ➡️ `tdd`)

**This is the most hardcore setting in the entire bridging scheme.**This extension forces the TDD (Test-Driven Development) guardrail to be enabled. Before actually modifying production code, corresponding test cases must be written first! This forces the entire implementation process to stabilize.**RED-GREEN-REFACTOR** (Red-Green-Reconstruction)This model completely eliminates the reliance on luck-based black-box programming.

### 4. 主代码完成后拦截【强制】 (
`after_implement` ➡️ `verify`)

AI often confidently declares that the task is complete, only to fail when run on an assembly line. Here...`verify`The hook became an iron gate, strictly prohibiting anyone or any large model from blindly "claiming" completion. Developers must provide substantial verification evidence that has passed testing (such as...`npm test`(Those who pass the identification process must be identified; otherwise, they are strictly prohibited from proceeding to the subsequent merging stage.)

## 进阶战术板：应对复杂场景
In addition to implicitly mounted automated lifecycle hooks, Superpowers Bridge also exposes a series of advanced tools in the form of standalone commands, specifically designed to tackle the toughest challenges in the later stages of development:

- **深度排障 (
`/speckit.superb.debug`)**When encountering persistent bugs, combine the context to introduce systemic root-cause debugging, peeling back the layers until the true lesion is located.- **专业审视 (
`/speckit.superb.critique`)**From the perspective of a senior architect, we move beyond the fragmented code implementation and re-examine the original specifications and the set of changes to conduct a comprehensive and independent code review.- **意见回应 (
`/speckit.superb.respond`)**Specifically designed to implement "review feedback"(CR)"And the design enables a closed loop of repair in team collaboration, from feedback and explanation, automated coding modification to one-click supplementation of test cases."- **优雅收尾 (
`/speckit.superb.finish`)**: In full passage`verify`After verification, the relevant code is intelligently organized and a semantic changelog is generated. Finally, the code is securely committed in a standardized, minimalist format.

## 获得的结果
After implementing this toolchain, characterized by strong constraints and high performance, the results were remarkable. Project progress and quality transformed from a black box, untouchable by outsiders, to 100% visible and controllable. More importantly, the Test-Driven Development (TDD) barrier significantly reduced the time spent on repeated code modifications and rollbacks; each submission that passed validation and review became reassuring and reliable. The team's engineers not only escaped the frustration of being plagued by messy code but also genuinely regained their trust and sense of control over AI-assisted coding.

## 经验与总结
In implementing this practice, we found that the biggest obstacle actually came from developers' past path dependency of rushing to "write code." Suddenly shifting the requirement to write specifications first, and even mandating writing failure test cases during TDD, inevitably caused growing pains in the first few days. However, once the team benefits from the deterministic experience of this "red-green refactoring" mechanism, they will completely reject the random, shotgun-style modifications. Our next step is to inject a more intelligent context boundary determination strategy into this extension.

## 下一步
If you are a proponent of standardized and self-disciplined development, or if your team has already begun to implement Spec Kit projects in practice, you can register this extension into your current workflow with just one simple command. Please ensure that Spec Kit is installed in your Node.js environment.`spec-kit`Core (`>= 0.4.3`Version) & Superpowers`>= 5.0.0` Version):

```bash
specify extension add superpowers-bridge --from https://github.com/RbBtSn0w/spec-kit-extensions/releases/download/superpowers-bridge-v1.0.0/superpowers-bridge.zip
```

With this robust set of safeguards, you'll find that writing flawless, high-quality code has never been so reassuring. Give it a try and experience the unique charm of adding engineering constraints to AI!
